title: Summer Evening with Coco 'n' the Fellas
titleEn: Summer Evening with Coco 'n' the Fellas
titleBg: Лятна вечер с Coco 'n' the Fellas
description: An outdoor summer celebration of jazz, swing, and world music at the Merton Apprentice.
descriptionEn: An outdoor summer celebration of jazz, swing, and world music at the Merton Apprentice.
descriptionBg: Лятно празненство на открито с джаз, суинг и уърлд музика в Merton Apprentice.
body:
Come and join us for an evening of Summer celebrations!!! 

Coco 'n' the Fellas will be leading you through an evening of jazz, swing, fusion, funk and even world music! Get your swag on and your high heels off as you won't be able to resist dancing! 

The entry is FREE and the band will be playing at 8pm! 

The venue is open from midday serving beer, wines, spirits, bubbly and more ! There are several very good restaurants on site and the venue is happy for customers to bring food from any of these to the premises.

Look forward to seeing you then!!! 

http://coconthefellas.com 
http://mertonapprentice.com/index.html
bodyEn:
Join us for a summer celebration! Coco 'n' the Fellas will lead you through an evening of jazz, swing, fusion, funk, and world music. Don't resist the urge to dance!

Free entry. The band starts at 8 PM. The venue offers a great selection of drinks, and you're welcome to bring food from the local restaurants on site.
bodyBg:
Присъединете се към нашето лятно празненство! Coco 'n' the Fellas ще ни водят през една вечер с джаз, суинг, фюжън, фънк и уърлд музика. Не забравяйте удобните обувки за танци!

Вход свободен. Групата започва в 20:00 ч. Мястото предлага богат избор от напитки, като можете да донесете храна от съседните ресторанти на място.
